summary: Regression verification after fix for Edit Booking. Backend PUT /api/bookings/{bid} is implemented (server.py lines 805-844) with overlap-exclude-self, status==aktif guard, room re-resolve, and updated_at/updated_by audit fields. DialogTitle in Bookings.jsx now conditional ('Edit Booking' / 'Booking Baru'). All 5 pytest cases in test_bookings_edit.py PASS. End-to-end UI flow (login owner -> /bookings -> click edit -> verify title 'Edit Booking' -> change nama_tamu -> Simpan -> PUT 200 -> toast 'diperbarui' -> modal closes -> card reflects new name) PASSES. Dashboard 'Booked' ribbon also re-verified visually (Room 7 brown, '30 Jun, 11.20' ribbon, Booked badge, guest 'nanta', legend includes Booked).

issues: Console warning persists: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' (a11y, non-blocking)

Hydration warning: <span> as child of <option> inside <select data-testid=bk-room> due to build instrumentation injecting x-component span around r.nomor. Functional but noisy; pre-existing, not caused by this fix.

critical_code_review_comments: PUT handler correctly excludes self (`'id': {'$ne': bid}`) in overlap check - matches review comment from iteration_5
PUT handler correctly enforces status=='aktif' guard so cancelled/checked-in bookings cannot be edited
PUT handler refreshes room_nomor/room_tipe when room_id changes - good
log_activity 'update_booking' added for audit trail - good
Minor: PUT does not return updated doc explicitly stripped of _id at insert time, but `find_one(... , {'_id': 0})` is used at return - correct
Minor (non-blocking): DialogContent still missing aria-describedby (a11y). Add a hidden DialogDescription for cleaner console.
seed_data_creation: Pytest fixture created TEST_-prefixed bookings and auto-cancelled them; UI test cleaned up edited booking via cancel button at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Booking feature fully working end-to-end. Backend PUT /api/bookings/{bid} implemented and tested. Frontend DialogTitle conditional working. Only outstanding minor items are a11y warnings (aria-describedby on DialogContent) and pre-existing hydration warning about <span> inside <option> from build instrumentation - both non-functional. Dashboard Booked ribbon continues to render correctly.
rca_of_the_issue: Original issue (iteration_5): backend route was missing causing 405 + frontend title always showed 'Booking Baru'. Fix in iteration_6 added PUT handler and made DialogTitle conditional on editId. Verified via pytest + Playwright e2e.
